    calculateAlertMessage(Vehicle) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
    Generates an alert message to show in the vehicle card based on its alerts

    commence(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, AuthenticationException) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.security.AuthEntryPointJwt
    Processes a call from the Spring if it finds and error authenticating instead of throwing a generic error
    COOLANT_FLUSH - Enum constant in enum class com.pitlane.pitlane.model.Maintenance.MaintenanceType
    Enum representing vehicle coolant flush
    corsConfigurationSource() - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.config.WebSecurityConfig
    Cors configuration that allows to replace the default Cors setup allowing more control.
    CostsController - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.controller
    Costs Controller

    The service that contains the logic for the dashboards

    CostsSummaryDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    Dto used to transmit information about the maintenance costs for the user dashboard
    CostsSummaryDto() - Constructor for class com.pitlane.pitlane.dto.CostsSummaryDto
     
    CostsSummaryDto.CategoryCostDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    A Dto that organizes costs by category with total spent and the percentage of the total spent
    CostsSummaryDto.VehicleCostDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    A Dto that organizes costs by vehicle with the vehicle id and name, the total spent and the percentage of the total spent
    createMaintenance(User, UUID, CreateMaintenanceRequestDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.MaintenanceController
    Creates a maintenance for a given vehicle
    createMaintenance(UUID, User, CreateMaintenanceRequestDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.MaintenanceService
    Creates a maintenance for a vehicle if it exists, creates an alert if prompted and resolved any alert pending for a previous maintenance of the same type
    CreateMaintenanceRequestDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    Dto representing a maintenance creating with information about the maintenance and the alert
    CreateMaintenanceRequestDto() - Constructor for class com.pitlane.pitlane.dto.CreateMaintenanceRequestDto
     
    createVehicle(User, Vehicle) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.VehicleController
    Creates a vehicle with the information provided
    createVehicle(User, Vehicle) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.VehiclesService
    Creates a vehicle for the logged user

    User Detail Service
